banarasi_silk.care: Dry clean only. Store with acid-free tissue.
banarasi_silk.draping_tip: The weight helps the saree drape naturally. Pin the pallu for structured look.

kanjeevaram_silk.characteristics: Pure mulberry silk with contrasting pallu, temple motifs
kanjeevaram_silk.care: Dry clean. Never fold on zari lines.
kanjeevaram_silk.draping_tip: Best in traditional Nivi style. Use a wide-border saree for petite frames to add volume.

chanderi.characteristics: Lightweight, sheer, gold/silver zari with butti motifs
chanderi.care: Gentle hand wash or dry clean
chanderi.draping_tip: Light and flowy — ideal for summer events. Layer with a contrast blouse for depth.

tussar_silk.care: Dry clean preferred. Air dry in shade.
tussar_silk.draping_tip: The natural texture adds dimension. Pair with oxidized jewelry.

georgette.care: Hand wash cold or dry clean
georgette.draping_tip: Best for pre-stitched sarees and anarkalis. Falls beautifully on all body types.

cotton.care: Machine wash. Iron while damp for best results.
cotton.draping_tip: Starch lightly for crisp look. Bengali drape works beautifully.

chiffon.draping_tip: Needs a good-quality slip/petticoat underneath. Beautiful for pallu display.

net.care: Dry clean only for embroidered versions
net.draping_tip: Always layer over a solid base. Creates a glamorous, layered effect.

linen.care: Machine wash gentle. Embrace natural wrinkles.
linen.draping_tip: Best for structured garments like kurtas and blazers. Wrinkles are part of the charm.

organza.draping_tip: Creates volume and drama. Perfect for ruffled sarees and structured dupattas.

fair.metallic: Both gold and silver work well
fair.tip: Jewel tones create beautiful contrast. Avoid colors too close to skin tone.

wheatish.metallic: Gold is more flattering than silver
wheatish.tip: Warm earth tones are your best friend. Mustard and coral make wheatish skin glow.

dusky.metallic: Gold is stunning, copper even better
dusky.tip: Bold, bright colors create gorgeous contrast. Don't shy away from neons and metallics!

dark.tip: You can pull off the brightest colors beautifully. White and ivory look stunning on deep skin.

pear.saree_tips: Choose a saree with a heavily embellished pallu to draw attention upward. Avoid stiff fabrics at the hip.
pear.lehenga_tips: A-line or flared lehenga. Avoid mermaid/fishtail. Pair with a statement blouse.

apple.saree_tips: Drape the pallu in a way that flows over the midsection. Choose fluid fabrics like georgette.
apple.lehenga_tips: High-waisted with structured corset blouse. Avoid heavy waistbands.

hourglass.characteristics: Balanced bust and hips, defined waist
hourglass.saree_tips: Any draping style works! Fitted blouse + defined waist = stunning. Try a belted saree look.
hourglass.lehenga_tips: Mermaid or fishtail lehenga showcases your curves. Add a belt for definition.

rectangle.saree_tips: Choose sarees with heavy borders to add volume. Pleated pallu creates curves.
rectangle.lehenga_tips: Flared lehenga with structured blouse. Volume creates the illusion of curves.

inverted_triangle.saree_tips: Choose a saree with a heavily decorated border to add volume at the bottom. Avoid big pallu pins.
inverted_triangle.lehenga_tips: Heavy embroidered lehenga skirt with a simple blouse. Balance top-heavy silhouette.

plus_size.saree_tips: Georgette and chiffon drape beautifully. Vertical patterns elongate. Avoid very stiff silk.
plus_size.lehenga_tips: A-line lehenga in flowing fabric. Vertical embroidery creates lengthening effect.
plus_size.confidence_note: Every body is beautiful. Fashion is about celebrating your shape, not hiding it!

petite.saree_tips: Choose smaller prints. Avoid very wide borders. Pre-stitched saree with heels adds height.
petite.lehenga_tips: High-waisted, just-above-ankle length. Avoid floor-sweeping designs. Wear heels.

avoid: very short kurtas (can look too long)
tall.saree_tips: You can carry heavy Banarasi/Kanjeevaram beautifully. Full-length pallu looks regal.
tall.lehenga_tips: Floor-length with trail works beautifully. You can carry heavy embroidery and volume.

nivi.steps: Tuck, pleat, wrap, pin pallu over left shoulder

bengali.steps: No pleats, wrap around body, key hole front, pallu over right shoulder

gujarati.steps: Front pallu from back to front over right shoulder, pin with decorative brooch

maharashtrian.steps: 9-yard saree tucked between legs, dhoti style, pallu over left shoulder

coorg.steps: Pleats at back, front and back, starched cotton, heavy gold jewelry

pinned_pallu.steps: Neat box pleats, pallu pinned at shoulder, displayed across chest

lehenga_drape.steps: Saree draped as skirt, separate dupatta, modern blouse

front_pallu.steps: Pallu draped across front like shawl, loose and flowing

south_india.wedding_tradition: Bride wears Kanjeevaram in red/gold. Groom wears veshti with angavastram.
south_india.temple_dress: White/cream saree with gold border. Men: white dhoti with angavastram.
south_india.jewelry: Temple jewelry, kemp stones, gold jhumkas, kamarbandh

north_india.wedding_tradition: Bride wears red lehenga with heavy embroidery. Groom wears cream/ivory sherwani.
north_india.festival_wear: Bright colors, heavy dupattas, embroidered kurtas
north_india.jewelry: Kundan, polki, meenakari, maang tikka, nath

western_india.wedding_tradition: Bride wears Paithani/Banarasi. Groom wears kurta with dhoti or churidar.
western_india.festival_wear: Navratri chaniya choli, tie-dye, mirror work
western_india.jewelry: Kundan, glass bangles, oxidized silver, temple earrings

eastern_india.wedding_tradition: Bengali bride: red/white Banarasi with shakha pola bangles. Assamese: mekhela chador.
eastern_india.festival_wear: White and red for Durga Puja, Dhakai jamdani for formal events

economy.tips: Look for end-of-season sales. Cotton and rayon are best value. Accessorize to elevate.

mid_range.tips: Best value segment. Good quality fabrics. Look for Myntra Mega Sales for 50-70% off.

premium.tips: Pure fabrics, designer labels. Worth investing for wedding/special occasions.

luxury.tips: Heirloom quality pieces. Consider renting for one-time occasions via Flyrobe.
